title: nemesia aurantia
intro: Nemesia aurantia, also known as the Small Yellow Nemesia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a perennial herb with small, yellow flowers that are fragrant and attract pollinators. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Nemesia aurantia can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system.
